steps.title: Form the direct question
steps.content: The words "to find the answer" show that the preceding blank must pose a direct question. A direct question needs auxiliary-subject inversion and a question mark.

steps.title: Check word order and punctuation
steps.content: A has declarative word order and a period. B has a question mark but still uses declarative order. C has inversion but ends with a period. The remaining option has both inversion and a question mark. The answer is D.
